data.title: Moonshot Listing: Account X has nothing to do with Moonshot. Verified token information will be released later.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Moonshot Listing posted on the X platform that its X account has nothing to do with Moonshot officials. Previously, the account had been publishing information about tokens added to Moonshot's "New" option, but it has received a notice from Moonshot that due to the recent update, unverified tokens will also appear in the "New" option, so its robot program will subsequently publish verified token information.

data.title: Bitdeer signed a $17 million supply chain financing agreement with a Singapore financial institution, and its BTC holdings reached 724 at the end of January.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released an unaudited mining and operations update report for January 2025, which disclosed that it produced 126 bitcoins from self-mining in January, a decrease from 145 bitcoins in the previous month. As of January 31, Bitdeer's Bitcoin holdings reached 724. In addition, Bitdeer also disclosed that it had signed a $17 million supply chain financing agreement with a Singaporean financial institution and completed financing withdrawal in January 2025. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Due to the increased scrutiny, Bitmain has recently experienced delays in shipping mining machines to US customers.
data.description: Bitmain Technology Co. Ltd. has recently experienced delays in shipping machines to U.S. customers due to increased scrutiny by U.S. Customs and Border Protection. The delays come as the U.S. Department of Commerce blacklisted Bitmain’s AI subsidiary Xiamen Sophgo Technologies Ltd. in January, accusing the company of “acting at the behest of Beijing to promote China’s goal of domestic advanced chip production.” Bitmain, which controls 90% of the market for computers dedicated to bitcoin mining, was already affected by Trump’s tariffs in 2018. “About three months ago, U.S. Customs began randomly checking almost all air-shipped bitcoin mining machines,” said Nuo Xu, president of the China Digital Mining Association. (Bloomberg)

data.title: FTX creditor representative Sunil: FTX Estate sold 41 million locked SOL in three auctions
Analyst: Coinbase expected to report revenue of $1.84 billion in Q4
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to analyst expectations compiled by FactSet, Coinbase is expected to report earnings per share (EPS) of $2.11 and revenue of $1.84 billion in the fourth quarter. This is a significant increase from Q4 2023 earnings of $1.04 per share on revenue of $954 million. Analysts estimate Coinbase’s total trading volume in the fourth quarter to be $216 billion, up from $185 billion in the third quarter and $154 billion in the fourth quarter of 2023. While the growth is significant, it is still far below the $312 billion in trading volume Coinbase recorded in the first quarter of last year, when the approval of a bitcoin spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) sparked a renewed boom in cryptocurrency trading.
Investors will also be watching the continued growth of Coinbase’s subscription and services business, which includes the revenue the company earns from its stablecoin USDC. The segment is expected to report revenue of $611 million, up from $375 million in the year-ago period. (Barrons)

data.title: Opinion: The US SEC is likely to abandon the Coinbase lawsuit or reach some kind of agreement
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Donald Trump's return to the White House has given Bitcoin and Coinbase investors more reasons to cheer. The new president has promised to boost the development of the U.S. crypto industry by relaxing regulations. Investors will learn whether this celebration translates into higher profits after the close of trading on Thursday.
Trump has promised to make the United States the "global cryptocurrency capital" by introducing a more relaxed regulatory system. Trump has appointed or nominated pro-cryptocurrency regulators at multiple agencies, including the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).
Under the leadership of Acting Chairman Mark Uyeda, the SEC has begun to advance a cryptocurrency working group aimed at developing a plan for the industry's legal operations in the United States, while venture capitalist David Sacks has led similar efforts in the White House.
These changes are crucial to Coinbase because the SEC sued the company in 2023, accusing it of operating an unregistered securities exchange. Coinbase has defended the allegations. Under Trump's leadership, the SEC may have a high probability of dropping the case or reaching some kind of agreement that allows Coinbase to continue operating as planned. As of now, Coinbase has not responded to a request for comment. (Barrons)

data.title: OKX Web3 Wallet is now connected to the Story Protocol network
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Web3 wallet is now connected to the Story Protocol mainnet. Users can switch to the Story Protocol mainnet with one click without manual configuration to view, transfer, trade Story Protoco mainnet NFTs in the OKX NFT market, and manage related assets.
It is reported that Story Protocol is a Layer 1 focused on intellectual property (IP) management, dedicated to completely changing the way the traditional creative economy works through transparency and programmability on the chain. As the industry's leading one-stop Web3 portal, OKX Web3 wallet has supported more than 120 popular public chains, and provides a seamless experience of App, plug-ins, web pages and Telegram Mini wallets, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.

data.title: a16z Crypto Managing Partner Chris Dixon: Brian Quintenz will be an excellent CFTC Chairman
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After Brian Quintenz, global head of a16z Crypto policy, was nominated by US President Trump as the next chairman of the US Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), Chris Dixon, managing partner of a16z Crypto, posted on the X platform that Brian Quintenz has joined a16z Crypto for more than three years, initially as a senior consultant and later as a policy director. His expertise is very valuable to the cryptocurrency industry and he will be an excellent CFTC chairman.

data.title: Analyst: Fed may not cut rates until fall
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MainSky Asset Management analyst Eckhard Schulte said that the slow progress of US inflation may mean that the Federal Reserve will not cut interest rates until the fall, or not at all this year. "This is not our core assumption, but in the end it will not establish a new 'market static'," Schulte said. U.S. inflation data in January was higher than expected, prompting a knee-jerk reaction in the U.S. Treasury market and rising yields. Schulte said this would only happen if the Federal Reserve talked about possible rate hikes. "But as long as the inflation situation does not deteriorate significantly in the coming months, this will not happen." (Jinshi)

data.title: LBank will launch MyShell (SHELL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch MyShell (SHELL) at 22:30 (SGT) on February 13, and open the SHELL/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 19:00 on February 13, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 19:00 on February 14.
